name: context7-docs
tagline: Fetches current library and framework docs via Context7's resolve-library-id and query-docs tools instead of relying on training data.
verdict: Sound design: explicit call caps, an explicit warning against passing secrets to the API, and a clear resolve-then-query workflow. Weak spots: an oversized ~800-char frontmatter description that outgrows the dispatch-signal budget, no negative triggers, only partial failure-path coverage, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance despite scope overlap with generic web search and other doc-lookup skills.
Only the auth-error failure path is covered; no guidance for a no-match or empty resolve-library-id result.
Description block runs roughly 800 characters across lines 4-15, well past the paragraph-wall threshold.
